rationale: Educ. Code §31.074 governs distribution of open education resource instructional materials. It has no connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts.
quote: The commissioner shall provide for the distribution of open education resource instructional materials in a manner consistent with distribution of instructional materials approved under Subchapter B.
_note: No relationship between the proposed homestead exemption increase and this education materials distribution statute.
